calculate_exact_match.description: 精确匹配计算方式: normalized(默认标准化), strict(严格匹配), fuzzy(模糊匹配), semantic(语义匹配), rouge(ROUGE匹配), tfidf(TF-IDF匹配), keyword(关键词匹配)

calculate_f1_score.description: F1分数计算方式: word(默认词汇), rouge(ROUGE), semantic(语义), jaccard(Jaccard)

calculate_partial_match.description: 部分匹配计算方式: word_overlap(默认词汇重叠), semantic(语义), rouge(ROUGE), tfidf(TF-IDF), jaccard(Jaccard)

calculate_semantic_similarity.description: 语义相似度计算方式: sentence_transformer(默认), bert(BERT), tfidf(TF-IDF), word2vec(Word2Vec), jaccard(Jaccard)

calculate_answer_coverage.description: 答案覆盖率计算方式: simple(默认简单), rouge(ROUGE), sentence(句子), weighted(加权)

calculate_answer_relevance.description: 答案相关性计算方式: word_overlap(默认词汇重叠), semantic(语义), tfidf(TF-IDF), weighted(加权), rouge(ROUGE)

calculate_context_utilization.description: 上下文利用率计算方式: simple(默认简单), semantic(语义), tfidf(TF-IDF), rouge(ROUGE), ngram(N-gram), weighted(加权)。n: N-gram的N值, weights: 加权计算的权重

calculate_completeness.description: 答案完整性计算方式: simple(默认简单), coverage(覆盖度), entities(实体), rouge(ROUGE), weighted(加权)。model_name: 实体识别模型, weights: 加权计算的权重

calculate_conciseness.description: 答案简洁性计算方式: ratio(默认长度比例), semantic(语义压缩度), rouge(ROUGE压缩度), density(信息密度), weighted(加权)
